CustomField.description: This field is auto-updated when the Install or Remove Assembly button is used. It captures the Assembly CSN from the Asset History. Not used for Airframe assemblies.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is auto-updated when the Install or Remove Assembly button is used. It captures the Assembly CSN from the Asset History. Not used for Airframe assemblies.
CustomField.label: CSN at Last Install
